items.name_cn:
【cléa 】 m82383 ( )
Made of monogram canvas with a colorful leather lining, the "portefeuil lisa". A compact wallet with a coin pocket featuring a leather pull tab and a card slot. The size is also attractive for small bags and clutches. Inside features a bill compartment, 2 flat pockets, and 4 card slots.
Size: 9 x 11.5 x 1.5cm

items.name_en: 【Coin Purse】 m12217 Monogram Red m12229 Monogram Blue (Print-Santa Collection)
items.name_cn:
【Coin Purse】 m12217 Monogram Red m12229 Monogram Blue (Print-Santa Collection)
This coin purse belongs to the Candy Factory collection, dressing the brand mascot Vivienne in festive attire and paying tribute to the colorful holiday season with delicious seasonal candies, making it a perfect collector's gift. The monogram canvas creates a compact shape, while eye-catching metal details like the key ring and Vivienne-shaped zipper complete the look.
Size: 7 x 1.5 x 12 cm

items.name_en: 【Exclusive Photo m12961】This victorine wallet is a true collector's item from the exclusive 57th Street New York series, starring the brand's iconic mascot Vivienne. Made from iconic monogram coated canvas, it features a fun pattern that captures the vibrant New York lifestyle. The compact design offers smart organization, including a zip pocket for coins and six card slots. 12 x 9.5 x 2.5 cm (Length x Height x Width)

items.name_en: 【Exclusive Photo m13399 Black】This Rosalie coin purse is from the Louis Vuitton x Takashi Murakami reissue collection, dyeing the Monogram coated canvas with vibrant tones to cleverly pay homage to the distinctive style of Japanese artist Takashi Murakami. The compact structure features a rounded flap and snap closure, with an internal space including a coin purse with a Monogram pull tab. 8 x 2.5 x 11 cm (H x W x D)

items.name_en: 【Exclusive Photo m13992 Black】Takashi Murakami Collaboration Series. This zippy wallet is made of monogram canvas and is practical, featuring a spacious compartment, a zip coin pocket, and multiple credit card slots. Named for its secure wraparound zipper, it is lined with grained leather. Fully functional, it can also be used as a clutch. 19.5 x 10.5 x 2.5 cm (Length x Height x Width)

items.name_en: 【Exclusive Photo m14163 White】This Victorine wallet from the Louis Vuitton x Murakami series is small and exquisite. The colorful Monogram pattern reinterprets the classic motif with the famous rainbow tones of Japanese artist Takashi Murakami. The wallet is made of coated canvas with exquisite calfskin lining and silver hardware, and features a zip coin pocket, with multiple compartments inside for bills and business cards. 12 x 9.5 x 2.5 cm (L x H x W)

items.name_en: 【Exclusive Real Shot g11299 White Multicolor】This Emily notebook cover is from the Louis Vuitton x Takashi Murakami collaboration series, playfully reinterpreting the brand's classic elements with Monogram Multicolor canvas. The elegant background features Murakami's aesthetic colorful prints, while the leather interior flap and replaceable design add artisanal details. It can be paired with the Jane notebook, making it an elegant choice for long-lasting companionship. 22.5 x 2 x 14 cm (Height x Width x Length)

items.name_en: 【Exclusive Real Shot M12635 Embossed】This compact Victor wallet is made of Monogram Shadow calfskin, adorned with delicate Monogram embossed patterns, exuding a 'low-key luxury' temperament. The interior features a practical divider, a zippered pocket, a pocket for bills and receipts, and five card slots. The flip cover features a snap button design and is adorned with the Louis Vuitton logo. 11.5 x 9 x 2.5 cm (Length x Height x Width)

items.name_en: 【Exclusive Real Shot m13403 Black & Colorful】This replica Louis Vuitton x Murakami collaboration series classic card holder brings a playful new interpretation with rainbow tones. Made of coated canvas, the classic Monogram pattern is designed with the iconic vivid colors of Japanese artist Takashi Murakami, while the top is accented with a bright pink color. The card holder is suitable for large business cards and receipts inside, and features two classic card slots on the outside. 11 x 7 x 0.5 cm (Length x Height x Width)

items.name_en: 【Exclusive Real Shot m13409 Black Multicolor】This replica Louis Vuitton x Murakami series zip coin purse features a timeless design that blends practical functionality with playful style, adding vitality to the season. The coin purse is made of monogram coated canvas and features joyful rainbow tones, paying tribute to Takashi Murakami's iconic vivid color style. The coin purse has a silver zipper and multiple internal compartments, keeping coins, bills, and business cards neatly organized. 11 x 8.5 x 2 cm (Length x Height x Width)
